name: trv-gestion-inmobiliaria
description: CRM y generador de fichas TRV en TypeScript con extensión gratuita para portales inmobiliarios.

scripts.build: tsc && node --test dist/tests/conversation-audit.test.js dist/tests/conversation-audit-corpus.test.js dist/tests/conversation-understanding.test.js && node scripts/build-extension-zip.mjs && node scripts/check-static-app.mjs
